description: Ticket lookup, triage, article retrieval, and support recap workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Find a ticket by issue
core_tasks.goal: Locate relevant support tickets by issue description.

core_tasks.title: Summarize a support thread
core_tasks.goal: Summarize a ticket conversation and current state.

core_tasks.title: Classify severity
core_tasks.goal: Classify ticket urgency and escalation risk.

core_tasks.title: Suggest next response
core_tasks.goal: Draft a next support response using ticket context.

core_tasks.title: Find related knowledge article
core_tasks.goal: Retrieve a matching help article or resolution note.

core_tasks.title: Recap support backlog
core_tasks.goal: Summarize backlog health and top issues.

explicit_exclusions: Billing system mutation as a required task
